body:
### Features
- **AI Guard:** Support aiguard standalone mode [#8993](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8993)
- **AppSec:** Add missing APISec metrics + APISec reorg [#8588](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8588)
- **aws-sdk:** Allow a function service for per-resource span naming [#8922](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8922)
- **aws-sdk:** Link batch SQS receives to every producer [#9058](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9058)
- **General:** Opt-in OpenTelemetry HTTP semantic conventions (DD_TRACE_OTEL_SEMANTICS_ENABLED) [#8933](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8933)
- **General:** Warn when Next.js is loaded before dd-trace [#8901](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8901)
- **LLM Observability:** Sampling decisions, rates, and propagation [#9030](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9030)
- **OpenTelemetry:** Enable improved OTel trace compatibility via opt-in configuration [#8894](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8894)

### Fixes
- **AI Guard:** Resolve endpoint host correctly for regional Datadog sites [#9040](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9040)
- **AppSec:** Handle malformed url when parsing query [#9005](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9005)
- **AppSec:** Skip mongodb >=7 NoSQL tests on Node.js < 20 [#8975](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8975)
- **aws-sdk:** Allow EventBridge context injection up to 1mb [#9038](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9038)
- **benchmarks:** Surface variant errors and narrow non-benchmark change gate [#9031](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9031)
- **ci:** Apply Vitest ATR retries to project configs [#8985](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8985)
- **ci:** Deduplicate git and ci test metadata [#8974](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8974)
- **datastreams:** Preserve extracted schema field descriptions [#7838](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7838)
- **Dependencies:** Bump import-in-the-middle to 3.1.0 [#8972](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8972)
- **Dynamic Instrumentation:** Keep breakpoint id in sync after update [#8968](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8968)
- **express:** Restore loopback middleware phase ordering [#9062](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9062)
- **Feature Flags:** Bundle the optional peer so the plugin sees it [#8999](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8999)
- **General:** [OTLP] detect http/https protocol from parsedUrl.protocol [#9028](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9028)
- **General:** Expose resource, tags and maxPerSecond on SamplingRule [#9057](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9057)
- **General:** Guard middleware error publishing against re-entrant recursion [#8789](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8789)
- **General:** Stop exposing deprecated alias entries as Config properties [#9061](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9061)
- **General:** Surface late-load framework warning regardless of startupLogs [#9068](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9068)
- **General:** Test __non_webpack_require__ in optional-peer guard [#9051](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9051)
- **General:** Use UNIX-epoch nanoseconds for OTLP metric timestamps [#8978](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8978)
- **graphql:** Restore graphql-yoga execute spans on CommonJS [#9060](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9060)
- **LLM Observability:** Emit a single llm span for langchain + anthropic [#8938](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8938)
- **mariadb:** Stop tcp.connect spans leaking from 3.4.1 pools [#9064](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9064)
- **Profiling:** Fallback from allocation to heap profiling before v26 [#8946](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8946)
- **router:** Expose middleware option in TypeScript Integration types [#8582](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8582)
- **sampling:** Materialize the priority decision when reading the W3C sampled flag [#8926](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8926)
- **span-stats, exporters:** Derive socketPath from the agent URL [#9042](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9042)
- **web:** Let late routes supersede endpoint fallback [#8998](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8998)

### Performance
- **Dynamic Instrumentation:** Sample probes in breakpoint conditions [#8967](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8967)
- **loader:** Use synchronous iitm hooks when available [#8942](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8942)

### Documentation
- **agents:** Codify failure-handling and flaky-test discipline
- **General:** Reserve feat/fix for production code in commit convention [#9018](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9018)

### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking)
- **AppSec:** Disable remote config in the fastify RASP blocking suite [#9054](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9054)
- **codeowners:** Clean up stale and ambiguous rules [#8994](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8994)
- **dependabot:** Broaden auto-merge coverage and rebalance update groups [#8939](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8939)
- **Dependencies:** Bump @apm-js-collab/code-transformer from 0.14.0 to 0.15.0 in /vendor in the vendor-minor-and-patch-dependencies group across 1 directory [#9046](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9046)
- **Dependencies:** Bump @aws/durable-execution-sdk-js [#9037](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9037)
- **Dependencies:** Bump stripe [#9082](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9082)
- **Dependencies:** Bump the vendor-minor-and-patch-dependencies group across 1 directory with 2 updates [#9011](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9011)
- **Dependencies:** Bump undici from 6.24.0 to 6.27.0 [#8997](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8997)
- **Dependencies:** Bump vercel ai sdk dependency in tests [#9041](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9041)
- **Dynamic Instrumentation:** Drop unused snapshot probe index [#8969](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8969)
- **General:** Add editorconfig validation to linting [#7594](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7594)
- **General:** Bump google-gax dep in tests [#9050](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9050)
- **General:** Derive installed and tested plugin versions from one resolver [#9019](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9019)
- **General:** Fix independent plugin and config spec reliability [#9020](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9020)
- **General:** Parse and resolve defaults in getValueFromEnvSources [#8925](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8925)
- **General:** Prepare infrastructure for dropping Node.js 18/20 in v6 [#9033](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9033)
- **General:** Regenerate supported integration version metadata [#9072](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9072)
- **guardrails:** Remove redundant runtime-check unit test [#9098](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9098)
- **harness:** Make withVersions fail loudly on an unmatched module [#9069](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9069)
- bump pprof nodejs to v5.15.1 [#9087](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9087)
- **pr-title:** Make reverts always semver-patch [#8709](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8709)
- **prisma:** Cleaned up prisma tests [#8947](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8947)
- **prisma:** Skip lib checks for generated client builds [#8995](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8995)
- **Profiling:** Derive config from tracer env names directly [#8890](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8890)
- **Profiling:** Make profiling exporter fields private [#9043](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9043)
- **redis:** Prepare redis tests for redis v6 [#9027](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9027)
- **release:** Consolidate publish jobs into a matrix-driven single job [#9071](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9071)
- **release:** Improve release changelog readability and dependency scope [#9044](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9044)
- **release:** Support promoting pre-release to stable on v6.x [#9066](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9066)
- **setup:** Arm a 120s watchdog to turn exit-hangs into fast failures [#9056](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9056)
- **sirun:** Report operations per second [#9039](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9039)
- **startup:** Add ESM variant that exercises the iitm loader [#8956](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8956)
- **Test Optimization:** Stabilize selenium browser profiles [#9059](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9059)
